topics.title: Architecture Principle: project-scoped-storage-boundaries
topics.narrative:
Core principle we're enforcing: Each project has its own scoped artifact storage directory. Why? Prevents cross-project pollution and enables per-project versioning.
        Tradeoff: No global artifact sharing. Applies to:
        artifact paths, project contexts. Architectural principles aren't
        constraints you fight—they're the guardrails that let systems scale.
